sealing_boundary_statement: Runtime replay, release proof automation, governance CI, and deterministic evaluators may prepare evidence, but final Decision Proof sealing remains AAOS-owned.
aaos_retained_authority_statement: AAOS retains Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, final governance authority, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, and final risk classification.
not_authority_statement: This sealing status is evidence and eligibility state only. It must not seal Decision Proof, close audit, approve release, accept risk, execute rollback, or make final governance judgment.
sovereignty_statement: AAOS retains purpose and business intent, risk appetite, approval doctrine, identity trust chain, policy authority, decision router logic, escalation semantics, fail-closed policy, rollback policy, final risk classification, Decision Proof sealing logic, audit final judgment, and final governance authority.
